zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Belknap於1452年5月13日出生在英國艾可吉迪亞 霍爾時，她的父親Henry Belknap24歲，母親Margaret Knollys22歲。她於1468年與Philip Cooke結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1517年在英國艾可洛福德享年65歲，埋葬在英國艾可洛福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Belknap于1452年5月13日出生在英国艾可吉迪亞 霍爾时，她的父亲Henry Belknap24岁，母亲Margaret Knollys22岁。她于1468年与Philip Cooke结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1517年在英国艾可洛福德享年65岁，埋葬在英国艾可洛福德。

nameMeanings.name: Belknap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, the second element of which is most likely Middle English knappe ‘hilltop’. Compare Belnap .
History: Abraham Belknap (c. 1588–c. 1643) emigrated from Latton, Essex, England, to Lynn, MA, in the 1630s.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Belknap was born on 13 May 1452, in Gidea Hall, Essex, England, her father, Henry Belknap, was 24 and her mother, Margaret Knollys, was 22. She married Philip Cooke in 1468. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1517, in Romford, Essex, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Romford, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Belknap est née le 13 mai 1452, à Gidea Hall, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Henry Belknap, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Knollys, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Philip Cooke en 1468. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1517, à Romford, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Romford, Essex, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Belknapが1452年5月13日にイギリスエセックスギディー ハルで生まれた時，父Henry Belknapは24歳，母Margaret Knollysは22歳であった。1468年にPhilip Cookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1517年にイギリスエセックスロムフォードで65歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスロムフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Belknap(이)가 1452년 5월 13일 영국 에세스 지디 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Belknap(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Knollys(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1468년 Philip Cooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1517년 영국 에세스 롬퍼드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 롬퍼드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Belknap родилась 13 мая 1452 г. в местности гидеа холл, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Belknap было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Knollys, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip Cooke в 1468 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1517 г. в местности ромфорд, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности ромфорд, эссекс, Англия.
